text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for Inari One to race
against Oguri Cap in her senior year. Mejiro
Ardan will also be running, and everyone wants to
know just how well Inari One will hold up against
these two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One breaks out in a cold sweat when she
sees what great condition Oguri Cap is in. Still,
she steels herself, knowing she has to win today.
